title: A New Site for the Community
article_text: The teacher can draw a white sign for the front door. The date for the practice is on Friday. The model for the new site is on the table. We can raise a sign outside the door. The customer is behind the door. The teacher can explain the economic plan. The approach for the land is from the front. The charge for the site is low. Finally, a strong girl can sign the paper. Maybe the community is behind the site.

sentences.zh: 老师可以画一个白色的标志给前门。
